title: Specific Songs
description: Makes all songs from the soundtrack availible for the /playsound command.
body:
# Specific Songs

This is Specific Songs, a resource pack that allows the player to play all of the songs from the soundtrack in their world with the ```/playsound``` command. This includes all the songs from all upcoming game drops and updates.

To play a song, use the sound key:
`minecraft:song.<song_name>`

![Selecting a song from the /playsound sound list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dab512a085db306ae38a1935879890084acc7c96.png)

## Snapshot Support
If you install a version with songs from a recent version on an older version, the newer songs will not play even though they may be valid options in the sound selection of the command. All songs that are still in snapshot phase will have the sound key `minecraft:song.snapshot.<song_name>`.
